{# Section nav with the section root prepended (overrides pydata-sphinx-theme default). `parents` is the immediate-parent chain (excluding the global root). For pages inside a section subdirectory it contains exactly the section root, which is what we want to surface as the first sidebar entry. #} {% set show_nav_level = meta['html_theme.show_nav_level'] if (meta is defined and meta is not none and 'html_theme.show_nav_level' in meta) else theme_show_nav_level %}

{{ _("Section Navigation") }}

{%- if parents -%} {%- set section_root = parents[-1] -%}
  • {{ section_root.title }}
{%- else -%} {# Section root itself — mark as current so the section header is always visible. #}
  • {{ title }}
{%- endif -%} {{- generate_toctree_html( "sidebar", show_nav_level=show_nav_level | int, maxdepth=theme_navigation_depth | int, collapse=theme_collapse_navigation | tobool, includehidden=theme_sidebar_includehidden | tobool, titles_only=True ) -}}
